_comment: Curated AI-infrastructure repos. Momentum is computed from real GitHub signals (commit velocity + release recency + trend) by build_data.py. Edit this list to add/remove; the daily cron recomputes data.json.

repos.blurb: The framework that defined LLM app composition — chains, tools, agents.
Graph-based stateful agent orchestration from the LangChain team.
Data framework for connecting LLMs to your private data.
Role-playing multi-agent crews that collaborate on tasks.
Multi-agent conversation framework from Microsoft Research.
Type-safe agent framework from the Pydantic team.
Let agents drive a real browser — the fastest-rising agent tool.
High-throughput, memory-efficient LLM serving (PagedAttention).
LLM inference in C/C++ — the engine behind local AI everywhere.
Run open models locally with one command.
Fast serving runtime with RadixAttention for structured generation.
NVIDIA's toolkit for the fastest LLM inference on its GPUs.
Rust-built vector database optimized for filtered search.
Open-source vector database with built-in hybrid search.
Cloud-native vector database for billion-scale similarity search.
The embedding database that made RAG prototyping trivial.
Vector similarity search inside Postgres.
One API for 100+ LLM providers — the universal gateway.
Fast, open-source AI gateway with routing and guardrails.
Open-source LLM observability, tracing, and evals.
ML/LLM observability and evaluation in a notebook or server.
Node-graph backend for diffusion pipelines — the power-user's canvas.
Drag-and-drop builder for LLM apps and agents.
2x faster, 70% less memory LLM fine-tuning.
